title: arctotis decurrens
intro: Arctotis decurrens, also known as the wild daisy or African daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Arctotis decurrens include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a tincture, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
